title: Glass Marbles, LU-TIMW-HWP2
features: Can be used for traditional marble or marble games
description: Product Description Retro Style Glass Marbles. The quintessential playground classic. Glass Marbles of varying styles from Cats Eye, to Speckled, and Opalescent. Set these classic glass marbles rolling down marble runs, or get started with a good old fashioned game of marbles . There's many different ways to play, try a classic version of the schoolyard game, or make a new one! An excellent way to play away from screens, playable indoors or outdoors; all you need is a safe, flat space on the floor and off you go! Start a marble collection here with these retro-style classic designs. Retro Fun for All Ages Play a friendly game, or up the competition and play for keeps! Train an keen eye and work on your aim to keep your favourite marbles out of the hands of the other players! 100+2 Marbles in Mesh Drawstring Bag 40 Marbles in Retro Box 55 Piece Marble Set 160 Marbles in Retro Tin Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 748 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,962 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,962 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,962 Price £4.90 £ 4 . 90 — no data — no data £8.45 £ 8 . 45 Total Number of Marbles 102 40 55 160 Packaging Mesh Drawstring Pouch Sturdy Slide Open Box Display Box Metal Tin Marbles Multicoloured Cats Eye Assorted Assorted Assorted no data no data no data no data A Touch of Vintage Style Brought to you by KandyToys , SupeRetro is a range of retro-style classic toys and schoolyard games. Fromm Tiddlywinks to Train Sets and Marbles to Magic Tricks, SupeRetro has all the old-school favourites covered.
